content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: keep_401_boundary
C: "<"_comparison ∧ grace_30s ∧ "401"_on_expiry
P: off_by_one ∧ "<="_vs_"<" ∧ skew_budget_drift
V: edge_neg30s_200 ∧ edge_neg31s_401 ∧ exact_threshold_"401" ∧ missing_token_"401"
A: encode_grace_explicit ∧ single_compare_site ∧ ms_normalized ∧ regression_tests_boundary

@flint v0 hybrid
G: choose_architecture
C: "6" ∧ "4 months" ∧ team_deadline ∧ low_ops ∧ fast_ship
P: modular_monolith ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ clean_module_seams ∧ stable_apis
V: seam_review ∧ coupling_scan ∧ release_metrics
A: adopt_modular_monolith ∧ defer_split ∧ split(post_release)

[AUDIT]
Goal: choose_architecture.
Constraints: "6" and "4 months" and team_deadline and low ops and fast shipping.
Plan: modular_monolith and "PostgreSQL" and clean_module_seams and stable_apis.
Verify: seam_review and coupling_scan and release_metrics.
Answer target: adopt_modular_monolith and defer_split and split(post_release).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: verify_header_auth_risk
C: public("x-user-id") ∧ overrides_session ∧ no_gateway_contract
P: drop_hdr_at_gateway ∧ session.userId_only ∧ keep_401
V: spoof_denied ∧ missing_session_401 ∧ cross_user_denied
A: strip_public("x-user-id") ∧ bind_session_scope ∧ verify_signed_assertion

[AUDIT]
Goal: verify_header_auth_risk.
Constraints: public("x-user-id") and overrides_session and no_gateway_contract.
Plan: drop_hdr_at_gateway and session.userId_only and keep 401 behavior.
Verify: spoofed requests denied and missing_session_401 and cross_user_denied.
Answer target: strip_public("x-user-id") and bind_session_scope and verify_signed_assertion.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: async_await_refactor
C: single_site("next(err)") ∧ preserve_order ∧ minimal_diff
P: validate ∧ load ∧ branch_not_found ∧ side_effects ∧ respond
V: success_path ∧ validation_fail ∧ downstream_err ∧ no_double_next
A: wrap_await ∧ route_errors("next(err)") ∧ keep_signature ∧ flag_this_binding

[AUDIT]
Goal: async_await_refactor.
Constraints: single_site("next(err)") and preserve_order and minimal_diff.
Plan: validate and load and branch_not_found and side_effects and respond.
Verify: success_path and validation_fail and downstream_err and no_double_next.
Answer target: wrap_await and route_errors("next(err)") and keep_signature and flag_this_binding.
